ACTIVE_PRODUCTION_WORKFLOW.description: Production pipeline used in daily operations

folders.purpose: Core pipeline orchestration (ingestion, transformation, calculation, output)
Pipeline utilities, models, logging, multi-agent orchestration
subdirs: models/ - Pydantic schemas (KPI, workflows, data contracts)

critical_files: pipeline.yml - Endpoints, auth, validation, KPI formulas, outputs
kpis/kpi_definitions.yaml - All KPI formulas and thresholds

folders.purpose: Main entry point for pipeline execution
folders.trigger: Manual execution, GitHub Actions, scheduled jobs

folders.purpose: Interactive analytics dashboard for data exploration
folders.serves: KPI visualization, growth projections, report exports

folders.purpose: Raw input data and processed artifacts

structure.data/raw/: Input CSV files and Supabase exports
structure.logs/runs/: Timestamped run artifacts and audit logs

folders.purpose: Unit and integration tests for pipeline

ACTIVE_PRODUCTION_WORKFLOW.workflow_flow: Ingestion → Validation → Transformation → KPI Calculation → Output → Dashboard

LEGACY_ARCHIVED_CONTENT.description: Projects, scripts, and documentation no longer part of active workflow
LEGACY_ARCHIVED_CONTENT.note: Legacy maintenance artifacts were removed from the repository

tools.name: Supabase
tools.purpose: Database for persistent KPI storage and dashboard queries

tools.name: Azure Services
tools.purpose: Blob storage, Key Vault, Static Web Apps

PHASE_1_INGESTION.function: Load data from CSV files or Supabase with validation
PHASE_1_INGESTION.validation: Pydantic schema validation, checksum verification, duplicate detection
PHASE_1_INGESTION.output: Raw data stored with timestamp and immutable hash

PHASE_2_TRANSFORMATION.function: Normalize data, handle nulls/outliers, type conversion, referential integrity
PHASE_2_TRANSFORMATION.validation: Pandera schema validation, business rule enforcement

PHASE_3_CALCULATION.function: Compute all KPIs with formula traceability, time-series rollups, anomaly detection
PHASE_3_CALCULATION.validation: Precision validation, threshold enforcement, AI agent enrichment
PHASE_3_CALCULATION.output: KPI manifest with lineage and audit trail

PHASE_4_OUTPUT.function: Multi-format exports (Parquet/CSV/JSON), Supabase writes, dashboard refresh
PHASE_4_OUTPUT.validation: Transaction safety, idempotent upserts, SLA monitoring
PHASE_4_OUTPUT.output: Artifacts in logs/runs/, database updates, frontend refresh

ORCHESTRATION.function: Coordinates all 4 phases, manages config, logs, error handling
